zh.lifeSummary: Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh是William de Legh和Unknown de Legh (born Swineshead)的兒子，於1160年出生在英國爾希 萊。他於大約1204年與Margery Oughtrington結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。他去世於1250年在英國英格蘭爾希 萊享年90歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Legh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Leigh
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places (in at least sixteen counties, but especially Leigh in Lancashire) named either with the nominative case of Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’ (see Lee ) or with lēage, a late dative form of this word (see Lye ).
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surname 李, based on its Cantonese pronunciation. See   Li   1.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

variants.name: Rikert

His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh was born in 1160, in High Legh, Cheshire, England as the son of William de Legh and Unknown de Legh (born Swineshead). He married Margery Oughtrington about 1204. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. He died in 1250, in High Legh, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 90.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh(은)는 1160년 영국 체실르 히 레그h에서 William de Legh(와)과 Unknown de Legh (born Swineshead)의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1204년 Margery Oughtrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1250년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 히 레그h에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Richard de Legh - Lord of West Hall and High Leigh родился в 1160 г. в местности хаи лег, чешир, Англия. Его родителей звали William de Legh и Unknown de Legh (born Swineshead). Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Oughtrington около 1204 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Он умер в 1250 г. в местности хаи лег, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 90 лет.
